source_pr.title: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #21726 
close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/21946

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Before the changing, the data race test `go test -v -vet=off  -race -check.f TestIssue9805 -test.count 100 > test.log` like following:
```sh
[2020-12-22T06:16:12.308Z] WARNING: DATA RACE
```

After the changing, the test result and there is no race.

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

* No release note

symptoms: PR title: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope
failure_signature: PR title: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope.
fix_pattern: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope

evidence: evidence: PR title: executor: fix data race in extractTxnScope
evidence: remove `extractTxnScope(txn)` reading unionstore option; use `SessionVars.TxnCtx.TxnScope` directly to avoid concurrent txn access (distsql/request_builder.go, executor/*)

files: distsql/request_builder.go, executor/adapter.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/index_merge_reader.go, executor/table_reader.go, planner/core/cbo_test.go, session/session.go, session/session_test.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go

analysis:

Changed files (10): distsql/request_builder.go, executor/adapter.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/index_merge_reader.go, executor/table_reader.go, planner/core/cbo_test.go, session/session.go, session/session_test.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go
